name: Lizardfolk Laboratory
description:
🧪One night, decades ago, the breeding wing went silent on all comm channels. A containment failure allowed dozens of alpha males to break free from their tanks. They slaughtered the scientists, destroyed the security drones, and claimed the lower lab levels as their hunting grounds.

The facility was sealed — blast doors welded shut, power cut, and all official records erased.

The surface world believes X-17 is just a swampy ruin. But the Lizardfolk are still there, thriving in the dark. They’ve bred, evolved, and learned how to use the corridors, cages, and laboratories as their territory.🧪
creator: The Big Bad Wolf
